results.name: organvm/agentic-titan
results.desc: Polymorphic Agent Swarm Architecture: model-agnostic, self-organizing multi-agent system with 6 topologies, 1,095+ tests (adversarial, chaos, e2e, integration, performance, MCP, Ray), 18 completed phases.

results.name: raxrock/akm
results.desc: Adaptive Knowledge Mesh - Python framework combining knowledge graphs, vector databases, and GNNs into a self-organizing knowledge system. Features adaptive links with time-based decay, domain transformers for custom schemas, and LLM-powered semantic queries with reasoning paths.

results.name: Champesh94364/MyPA
results.desc: A self-organizing hierarchical Multi-Agent System. Send a task via Telegram → AI spawns agents dynamically → executes → reports back. Built with Python & Google ADK.

results.name: sugarcode25/financial-anomaly-detector
results.desc: Unsupervised anomaly detection system for equity markets using Self-Organizing Maps (SOM). Validated across 10 cross-asset tickers spanning 7 asset profiles. Built with Python, scikit-learn, and MiniSom.

results.name: gradrix/dendrite
results.desc: 🧠 Self-organizing AI agent with dendrite spawning - decomposes complex goals into neurons, spawns parallel sub-tasks, and aggregates results. Features smart parameter extraction, context isolation, and automatic data compaction. Built for Strava analytics with extensible tool system.

results.name: Anshul48/Synapse
results.desc: Synapse is a hybrid system that turns your Obsidian Vault into an intelligent, self-organizing library. It runs a local Python "Sidecar" alongside your vault that watches for new thoughts, restructures them into a tree-based hierarchy, and learns from your feedback.

results.name: Phi-losophe/LMC-PoC
results.desc: Exploring the universe as a self-organizing information system.   > Unified Information Compression Theory (UICT) links cognition, quantum physics, and cosmology through entropy optimization.   > Includes PoC code, predictions for dark matter, and consciousness quantification.

results.name: Phi-losophe/UICT_PoC
results.desc: Exploring the universe as a self-organizing information system: compression, entropy & consciousness.

results.name: roguetrainer/soc-economics-finance
results.desc: Self-Organized Criticality in economics & finance. Python implementations demonstrating how economic and financial systems self-organize toward critical points where small shocks trigger large disruptions, based on Bouchaud's 2025 paper on Self-Organized Criticality.

results.name: VICTOR-OMEGA/distributed-iot-systems
results.desc: A Python-based exploration of autonomous, self-organizing IoT clusters that balance workloads, recover from failures, and adapt in real time through decentralized coordination and peer-to-peer signaling.
